headline: Abbott (ABT) Launches Similac Campaign To Ease Social Media Pressure On Young Parents
summary: Similac, Abbott Laboratories' (NYSE:ABT) infant nutrition brand, has launched its "Love Without Measure" initiative. The campaign focuses on easing social media pressures on young and Gen Z parents and promoting a more supportive online community. Similac is partnering with motherhood experts and social media influencers to highlight mental health, inclusivity, and judgment free parenting. For investors following Abbott Laboratories, the move highlights how the company is engaging with...
